mutations.source:
+type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int
  +let masked:Int = value % 4294967296
  +let shifted:Int = (masked * pow(2, shift)) % 4294967296
  +let overflow:Int = floor(masked / pow(2, 32 - shift))
  +return (shifted + overflow) % 4294967296

+fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit != y_bit
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
  +return 4294967295 - (x % 4294967296)

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn md5_round (state:MD5State, func:Int, k:Int, s:Int, t:Int)->MD5State
  +let temp:Int = 0
  +if func == 0
    +set temp = md5_f(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 1
    +set temp = md5_g(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 2
    +set temp = md5_h(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +else
    +set temp = md5_i(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +let sum:Int = (state.a + temp + k + t) % 4294967296
  +let rotated:Int = left_rotate(sum, s)
  +let new_a:Int = (state.b + rotated) % 4294967296
  +return {a: state.d, b: new_a, c: state.b, d: state.c}

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let state:MD5State = {a: 1732584193, b: 4023233417, c: 2562383102, d: 271733878}
  +let len:Int = input.len
  +let bit_len:Int = len * 8
  +let padded:String = concat(input, "x")
  +let final_state:MD5State = md5_round(state, 0, 0, 7, 3614090360)
  +let hex:String = concat(to_string(final_state.a), to_string(final_state.b))
  +return hex

!test md5
  +with "" -> expect "17325841934023233417"

+type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int
  +let masked:Int = value % 4294967296
  +let left_part:Int = (masked * pow(2, shift)) % 4294967296
  +let right_part:Int = floor(masked / pow(2, 32 - shift))
  +return (left_part + right_part) % 4294967296

+fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit != y_bit
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
  +return 4294967295 - (x % 4294967296)

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn to_hex_byte (n:Int)->String
  +let hex_chars:String = "0123456789abcdef"
  +let high:Int = floor(n / 16)
  +let low:Int = n % 16
  +let h:String = char_at(hex_chars, high)
  +let l:String = char_at(hex_chars, low)
  +return concat(h, l)

+fn int_to_hex (n:Int)->String
  +let b0:String = to_hex_byte((n % 256))
  +let b1:String = to_hex_byte(floor((n % 65536) / 256))
  +let b2:String = to_hex_byte(floor((n % 16777216) / 65536))
  +let b3:String = to_hex_byte(floor(n / 16777216))
  +let r1:String = concat(b0, b1)
  +let r2:String = concat(r1, b2)
  +return concat(r2, b3)

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let a:Int = 1732584193
  +let b:Int = 4023233417
  +let c:Int = 2562383102
  +let d:Int = 271733878
  +let aa:Int = a
  +let bb:Int = b
  +let cc:Int = c
  +let dd:Int = d
  +let f_val:Int = md5_f(bb, cc, dd)
  +let sum1:Int = (aa + f_val + 3614090360) % 4294967296
  +let rot1:Int = left_rotate(sum1, 7)
  +set aa = (bb + rot1) % 4294967296
  +let final_a:Int = (a + aa) % 4294967296
  +let final_b:Int = (b + dd) % 4294967296
  +let final_c:Int = (c + bb) % 4294967296
  +let final_d:Int = (d + cc) % 4294967296
  +let h1:String = int_to_hex(final_a)
  +let h2:String = int_to_hex(final_b)
  +let h3:String = int_to_hex(final_c)
  +let h4:String = int_to_hex(final_d)
  +let r1:String = concat(h1, h2)
  +let r2:String = concat(r1, h3)
  +return concat(r2, h4)

!test md5
  +with "" -> expect "d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e"

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)

mutations.source:
+type HttpRequest = {method:String, path:String, host:String, port:Int, body:String, content_type:String}

+type HttpResponse = {status_code:Int, body:String}

+fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
  +let content_length:String = to_string(req.body.len)
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat(req.method, " "), req.path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", req.host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = concat(concat("Content-Type: ", req.content_type), "\r\n")
  +let line4:String = concat(concat("Content-Length: ", content_length), "\r\n")
  +let line5:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4), line5)
  +let full_request:String = concat(concat(headers, "\r\n"), req.body)
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_post_request(req)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
  +let header_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
  +check has_headers header_end >= 0 ~err_invalid_response
  +let body_start:Int = header_end + 4
  +let body:String = substring(response, body_start, response.len)
  +let first_line_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n")
  +let first_line:String = substring(response, 0, first_line_end)
  +let parts:List<String> = split(first_line, " ")
  +let status_str:String = get(parts, 1)
  +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
  +return {status_code: status, body: body}

!test build_http_post_request
  +with method="POST" path="/test" host="example.com" port=80 body="hello" content_type="text/plain" -> expect "POST /test HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.com\r\nContent-Type: text/plain\r\nContent-Length: 5\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\nhello"

+type HttpRequest = {method:String, path:String, host:String, port:Int, body:String, content_type:String}

+type HttpResponse = {status_code:Int, body:String}

+fn build_http_get_request (host:String, path:String)->String
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat("GET ", path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n"), "")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(line1, line2), line3)
  +let full_request:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
  +return full_request

+fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
  +let content_length:String = to_string(req.body.len)
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat(req.method, " "), req.path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", req.host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = concat(concat("Content-Type: ", req.content_type), "\r\n")
  +let line4:String = concat(concat("Content-Length: ", content_length), "\r\n")
  +let line5:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4), line5)
  +let full_request:String = concat(concat(headers, "\r\n"), req.body)
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_get (host:String, port:Int, path:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(host, port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_get_request(host, path)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_post_request(req)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
  +let header_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
  +check has_headers header_end >= 0 ~err_invalid_response
  +let body_start:Int = header_end + 4
  +let body:String = substring(response, body_start, response.len)
  +let first_line_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n")
  +let first_line:String = substring(response, 0, first_line_end)
  +let parts:List<String> = split(first_line, " ")
  +let status_str:String = get(parts, 1)
  +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
  +return {status_code: status, body: body}

+fn fetch_google ()->Result<String> [io,async,fail]
  +call response:HttpResponse = send_http_get("google.com", 80, "/")
  +return response.body

!test build_http_get_request
  +with host="google.com" path="/" -> expect "GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: google.com\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n"

mutations.source:
+fn build_http_get_request (host:String, path:String)->String
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat("GET ", path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n"), "")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(line1, line2), line3)
  +let full_request:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_get (host:String, port:Int, path:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(host, port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_get_request(host, path)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn fetch_google ()->Result<String> [io,async,fail]
  +call response:HttpResponse = send_http_get("google.com", 80, "/")
  +return response.body

sources:
+type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int
  +let masked:Int = value % 4294967296
  +let shifted:Int = (masked * pow(2, shift)) % 4294967296
  +let overflow:Int = floor(masked / pow(2, 32 - shift))
  +return (shifted + overflow) % 4294967296

+fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit != y_bit
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
  +return 4294967295 - (x % 4294967296)

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn md5_round (state:MD5State, func:Int, k:Int, s:Int, t:Int)->MD5State
  +let temp:Int = 0
  +if func == 0
    +set temp = md5_f(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 1
    +set temp = md5_g(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 2
    +set temp = md5_h(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +else
    +set temp = md5_i(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +let sum:Int = (state.a + temp + k + t) % 4294967296
  +let rotated:Int = left_rotate(sum, s)
  +let new_a:Int = (state.b + rotated) % 4294967296
  +return {a: state.d, b: new_a, c: state.b, d: state.c}

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let state:MD5State = {a: 1732584193, b: 4023233417, c: 2562383102, d: 271733878}
  +let len:Int = input.len
  +let bit_len:Int = len * 8
  +let padded:String = concat(input, "x")
  +let final_state:MD5State = md5_round(state, 0, 0, 7, 3614090360)
  +let hex:String = concat(to_string(final_state.a), to_string(final_state.b))
  +return hex

!test md5
  +with "" -> expect "17325841934023233417"

+type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int
  +let masked:Int = value % 4294967296
  +let left_part:Int = (masked * pow(2, shift)) % 4294967296
  +let right_part:Int = floor(masked / pow(2, 32 - shift))
  +return (left_part + right_part) % 4294967296

+fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit != y_bit
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
  +return 4294967295 - (x % 4294967296)

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn to_hex_byte (n:Int)->String
  +let hex_chars:String = "0123456789abcdef"
  +let high:Int = floor(n / 16)
  +let low:Int = n % 16
  +let h:String = char_at(hex_chars, high)
  +let l:String = char_at(hex_chars, low)
  +return concat(h, l)

+fn int_to_hex (n:Int)->String
  +let b0:String = to_hex_byte((n % 256))
  +let b1:String = to_hex_byte(floor((n % 65536) / 256))
  +let b2:String = to_hex_byte(floor((n % 16777216) / 65536))
  +let b3:String = to_hex_byte(floor(n / 16777216))
  +let r1:String = concat(b0, b1)
  +let r2:String = concat(r1, b2)
  +return concat(r2, b3)

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let a:Int = 1732584193
  +let b:Int = 4023233417
  +let c:Int = 2562383102
  +let d:Int = 271733878
  +let aa:Int = a
  +let bb:Int = b
  +let cc:Int = c
  +let dd:Int = d
  +let f_val:Int = md5_f(bb, cc, dd)
  +let sum1:Int = (aa + f_val + 3614090360) % 4294967296
  +let rot1:Int = left_rotate(sum1, 7)
  +set aa = (bb + rot1) % 4294967296
  +let final_a:Int = (a + aa) % 4294967296
  +let final_b:Int = (b + dd) % 4294967296
  +let final_c:Int = (c + bb) % 4294967296
  +let final_d:Int = (d + cc) % 4294967296
  +let h1:String = int_to_hex(final_a)
  +let h2:String = int_to_hex(final_b)
  +let h3:String = int_to_hex(final_c)
  +let h4:String = int_to_hex(final_d)
  +let r1:String = concat(h1, h2)
  +let r2:String = concat(r1, h3)
  +return concat(r2, h4)

!test md5
  +with "" -> expect "d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e"

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int

  +let i:Int = 0

    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int

  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))

    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int

  +while i < 32

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int

  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn to_hex_byte (n:Int)->String
  +let hex_chars:String = "0123456789abcdef"

  +let h:String = char_at(hex_chars, high)

+fn int_to_hex (n:Int)->String

  +let b1:String = to_hex_byte(floor((n % 65536) / 256))
  +let b2:String = to_hex_byte(floor((n % 16777216) / 65536))

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let a0:Int = 1732584193

  +with "" -> expect "d41d8cd98f00b204e9800998ecf8427e"

+type HttpRequest = {method:String, path:String, host:String, port:Int, body:String, content_type:String}

+type HttpResponse = {status_code:Int, body:String}

+fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
  +let content_length:String = to_string(req.body.len)
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat(req.method, " "), req.path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", req.host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = concat(concat("Content-Type: ", req.content_type), "\r\n")
  +let line4:String = concat(concat("Content-Length: ", content_length), "\r\n")
  +let line5:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4), line5)
  +let full_request:String = concat(concat(headers, "\r\n"), req.body)
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_post_request(req)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
  +let header_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
  +check has_headers header_end >= 0 ~err_invalid_response
  +let body_start:Int = header_end + 4
  +let body:String = substring(response, body_start, response.len)
  +let first_line_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n")
  +let first_line:String = substring(response, 0, first_line_end)
  +let parts:List<String> = split(first_line, " ")
  +let status_str:String = get(parts, 1)
  +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
  +return {status_code: status, body: body}

!test build_http_post_request
  +with method="POST" path="/test" host="example.com" port=80 body="hello" content_type="text/plain" -> expect "POST /test HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.com\r\nContent-Type: text/plain\r\nContent-Length: 5\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\nhello"

+type HttpRequest = {method:String, path:String, host:String, port:Int, body:String, content_type:String}

+type HttpResponse = {status_code:Int, body:String}

+fn build_http_get_request (host:String, path:String)->String
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat("GET ", path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n"), "")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(line1, line2), line3)
  +let full_request:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
  +return full_request

+fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
  +let content_length:String = to_string(req.body.len)
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat(req.method, " "), req.path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", req.host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = concat(concat("Content-Type: ", req.content_type), "\r\n")
  +let line4:String = concat(concat("Content-Length: ", content_length), "\r\n")
  +let line5:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4), line5)
  +let full_request:String = concat(concat(headers, "\r\n"), req.body)
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_get (host:String, port:Int, path:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(host, port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_get_request(host, path)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_post_request(req)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
  +let header_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
  +check has_headers header_end >= 0 ~err_invalid_response
  +let body_start:Int = header_end + 4
  +let body:String = substring(response, body_start, response.len)
  +let first_line_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n")
  +let first_line:String = substring(response, 0, first_line_end)
  +let parts:List<String> = split(first_line, " ")
  +let status_str:String = get(parts, 1)
  +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
  +return {status_code: status, body: body}

+fn fetch_google ()->Result<String> [io,async,fail]
  +call response:HttpResponse = send_http_get("google.com", 80, "/")
  +return response.body

!test build_http_get_request
  +with host="google.com" path="/" -> expect "GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: google.com\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n"

!test build_http_post_request
  +with method="POST" path="/test" host="example.com" port=80 body="hello" content_type="text/plain" -> expect "POST /test HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: example.com\r\nContent-Type: text/plain\r\nContent-Length: 5\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\nhello"

+fn build_http_get_request (host:String, path:String)->String
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat("GET ", path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n"), "")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(line1, line2), line3)
  +let full_request:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_get (host:String, port:Int, path:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(host, port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_get_request(host, path)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn fetch_google ()->Result<String> [io,async,fail]
  +call response:HttpResponse = send_http_get("google.com", 80, "/")
  +return response.body

!test build_http_get_request
  +with host="google.com" path="/" -> expect "GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: google.com\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n"
